query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_active,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contact_count = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contact_count > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_contacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT project, COUNT(*) as contact_count FROM contacts GROUP BY project
) c ON c.project = p.name
WHERE p.lifecycleStatus = 'active';
